title: Trade Compat
description: Adds trade to popular mods. Create, Alex's Mobs, Quark and etc.
body:
**📖 About**

Trade Compat adds new villager trades for items from 10+ popular mods — like Create, Alex’s Mobs, Quark, and more.  
It expands the trading system by giving villagers offers based on what mods you have installed.

No need to mess with addons or configs — just install the mod and start trading!

---

**📃 Features**

- Mod-Based Trades: Villagers offer items from supported mods based on their profession.
- Balanced Integration: Trades match the theme and rarity of modded content.

---

**📝 Description**

How it works:
You install Trade Compat — that’s it.  
If a supported mod is installed, new trade deals will appear for relevant professions (like Nitwit for Create, Butcher for Alex’s Mobs, etc.).  

**📋 List of Supported Mods**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Alex’s Mobs
- Apotheosis
- Ars Nouveau
- Create
- Immersive Engineering
- Iron’s Spells & Spellbooks
- Mystical Agriculture
- Naturalist
- Quark
- Tinkers’ Construct

</details>

---

**🎁 Bonus Info**

If you install all supported mods, you’ll unlock ~155 trade deals.

---

**🧾 Credits**

Some of the original addons were distributed under the **MIT License**, which allows their content to be legally used in this mod.  
In addition, all necessary permissions from the original creators have been obtained.

The current version is released under the **MIT License**, even though many changes were made to the code.

---

_**Drop your feedback, thx!**_
